channel.title: Julia Smith's ITWS Page
channel.description: This is Julia Smith's ITWS homepage, featuring links to labs, projects, my objectives, and my resume. I will be updating this page throughout the semester.

item.title: Labs Homepage
item.description: This is the homepage for the labs. This is where you can navigate to each of the labs.

item.title: Lab 1
item.description: Lab 1 focused on creating the Azure, GitHub, and index.html page.

item.title: Lab 2
item.description: Lab 2 focused on creating a page on our website to represent my resume in HTML.

item.title: Lab 3
item.description: Lab 3 focused on creating multiple pages for my website, including a homepage and a page for each of the labs. It also includes navigation between the sites.

item.title: Lab 3B
item.description: Lab 3B utilized AI in order to improve the look and feel of the website. Using Claude AI, I was able to create a more visually appealing website.

item.title: Resume
item.description: A page representing my resume in HTML. I will continue updating this page as I gain more experience and skills.
